displayTitle: One Weld, Start to Signed Record

beats.narration: One nozzle weld, the whole Level Two job. The code picks the method, the appendix picks the criteria, your procedure ties them together.

payload.title: ONE WELD, START TO FINISH
payload.sub: Verify, interpret, classify, disposition, document — in order.

beats.narration: Before you read one indication, prove the test was valid. Right procedure revision, qualified materials logged, parameters in window, white light measured.

payload.heading: Step zero: earn the right to interpret

beats.narration: Now interpret every indication before measuring anything. A smear that wipes and stays gone is false. A line tracing the faying edge is geometry.
Measure the indication, not the flaw, at development time. A toe line a quarter inch by a sixteenth is four-to-one linear. The pattern permits none.
Reject, route the defect, reprocess from step zero. Then the record stands alone — cited, traceable, corrected with a single line, never erased.

payload.sub: A stranger with only your record reaches your call.
